queries.question: What is The Morning Show studio and address?
queries.sql:
SELECT Studio.name,  Address.street, Address.city, Address.state, Address.country
From Studio
JOIN Podcast on Podcast.studio_id = Studio.studio_id
JOIN Address on Podcast.Address_id = Address.Address_id WHERE Podcast.title = "The Morning Show"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?street ?city ?state ?country WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?address a :Address .
  ?podcast p:hasAddress ?address .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?address p:street ?street .
  ?address p:city ?city .
  ?address p:state ?state .
  ?address p:country ?country .
  ?podcast p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("The Morning Show"))
}

queries.question: For the podcasts - if any - that get 5-star reviews, where are they recorded?
queries.sql:
SELECT Studio.name
From Studio
JOIN Podcast on Podcast.studio_id = Studio.studio_id
JOIN Episode ON Episode.podcast_id = Podcast.podcast_id
JOIN Review ON Review.episode_id = Episode.episode_id
WHERE Review.rating = 5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasPodcast ?podcast .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasEpisode ?episode .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(?rating_f = 5)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where's The Morning Show recorded?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?street ?city ?state ?country WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?address a :Address .
  ?podcast p:hasAddress ?address .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?address p:street ?street .
  ?address p:city ?city .
  ?address p:state ?state .
  ?address p:country ?country .
  ?podcast p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("The Morning Show"))
} }
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?podcast p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("The Morning Show"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?street ?city ?state ?country WHERE {
  ?address a :Address .
  ?podcast a :Podcast .
  ?podcast p:hasAddress ?address .
  ?address p:street ?street .
  ?address p:city ?city .
  ?address p:state ?state .
  ?address p:country ?country .
  ?podcast p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = STR("The Morning Show"))
} }
}
